title: Roasted Kenyan Sardine Tagine
description: A roasted and velvety Kenyan dish featuring sardines, this tagine is a dairy-free friendly and energizing meal option, cooked to perfection in a ceramic tagine vessel using sous-vide techniques.

ingredients.name: sardines
ingredients.notes: canned in water, drained and rinsed

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender or food processor, combine onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the blended spice mixture, olive oil, and lemon juice.
Add the sardines to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Transfer the sardine mixture to a ceramic tagine vessel.
Cover the tagine with a lid and roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Using sous-vide techniques, seal the tagine and cook at 130 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the sous-vide bath and let it cool to room temperature.
Serve the roasted Kenyan sardine tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
